message:
test(serve): add OpenAPI spec generation and handler tests, push GenerateOpenAPISpec 22.5% → 100%

Register kernel commands with REST bindings to exercise full loop body of
GenerateOpenAPISpec (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE, categories, examples, path params).
Add handler tests for handleOpenAPISpec and handleSwaggerUI. Serve 57.3% → 57.9%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
